name: io.github.codespar/mcp-certta
description: MCP server for Certta — Brazilian identity + signature platform (KYC/KYB, biometrics, OCR, ICP-Brasil + electronic signature, orchestrated onboarding pipelines).

environmentVariables.name: CERTTA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key from the Certta dashboard

environmentVariables.name: CERTTA_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: API base URL — defaults to Certta production. Override for sandbox.
